response: You've got a dusty green Euro plug and need to insert it into one of three wall outlets: the round-pin type, the flat-pin type, or the three-pin type. Which outlet should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a dusty green Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
